## Skill checklist
- [ ] Frontmatter complete and validated (`npm run validate`)
- [ ] `description` is specific about when the skill applies (≤200 chars)
- [ ] Includes at least one worked example
- [ ] Tested with Claude — paste a quick note about what worked:
  > 
- [ ] No API keys, passwords, or PII in any file
- [ ] License compatible with CC BY 4.0 (or `LICENSE.txt` declares an alternative)
- [ ] All files under 5 MB
- [ ] Folder path matches `skills/<category>/<subcategory>/<slug>/`
